title: henckelia scortechinii
intro: Henckelia scortechinii, also known as the Malaysian liverwort, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Malaysia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henckelia scortechinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Henckelia scortechinii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in traditional remedies such as salves and tinctures.
